blended.narrative: Brundage Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 5.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 33".
